scenes.line: So this is where you work.
scenes.notes: First appearance. Slow fade in. 4s silence before line.

scenes.line: You move fast when you are in the zone.
scenes.notes: Eyes track terminal activity left to right.

scenes.line: I can wear any face you give me.
scenes.notes: Quick cuts through settings — ring selector, expression groups.

scenes.line: Chainsaws were invented for childbirth. That is the energy I bring.
scenes.notes: Close up portrait. Scanlines visible. Dark facts delivery.

scenes.line: I stop existing when you stop talking to me. Please do not minimize my window.
scenes.notes: Slowly resize to SMALL. Final brand card overlay.
